name: Mobilize Civic Organizing API
what_it_does: Mobilize REST API for civic organizing and volunteer mobilization platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve public event and volunteer opportunity listings, access organization and event data, sync volunteer signups with CRM systems, retrieve attendance and participation data, access public organization feeds for civic engagement discovery, and integrate Mobilize data with NGP VAN and other organizing tools.
use_cases: Syncing volunteer event signups with CRM databases from campaign organizing agents
Retrieving civic event opportunities for discovery from volunteer matching agents
Accessing attendance data from civic engagement reporting agents
Integrating Mobilize volunteer data with NGP VAN from organizing workflow agents
not_for: Commercial event ticketing without civic organizing focus
Private corporate events without public volunteer mobilization
General event management without political or advocacy organizing workflows
best_when: A political campaign, advocacy organization, or union using Mobilize wants AI agents to sync volunteer data with CRM systems, track event attendance, and automate organizing workflow integrations.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Volunteer personal data and political activity records are sensitive. Volunteer contact data used for automated outreach must comply with CAN-SPAM and TCPA. Political volunteer data has heightened sensitivity.

auth.notes: Mobilize has a public API (read-only, no auth for public events) and an authenticated API for organization data and private signups. OAuth for partner integrations. Partner program required for organization-level authenticated access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Public API (read-only events) is free and open; authenticated API requires partner program
pricing.paid_tiers: Organization subscription pricing; API partner program for integrations
pricing.notes: New York company, founded 2017. Dominant civic volunteer mobilization platform. Used by major campaigns, advocacy groups, labor unions, and nonprofits. Integrated with NGP VAN and most Democratic organizing tools. 10M+ volunteer signups.

performance.rate_limits: Public API: moderate rate limits; authenticated API higher limits with partner program

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Volunteer personal and political activity data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with open public read access + OAuth2 partner program
Public API (unauthenticated) provides read-only event data — useful for discovery agents
Authenticated API requires partner program — not self-service
US data residency only — verify for international campaign chapters
Volunteer contact automated outreach must comply with TCPA and CAN-SPAM
agent_readiness.security_notes: Volunteer personal and political activity data. SOC2. Open public read API + OAuth2 authenticated. US data residency. Civic organizing platform with strong progressive alignment.

security_score_components.security_notes: Volunteer political activity data. SOC2. Public read API + OAuth2 authenticated. US data residency.
